windows.title: St. Android's Missal — Traditional Latin Mass & Divine Office

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.copyright: Copyright (C) 2026 Robin L. M. Cheung, MBA. All rights reserved.
bundle.shortDescription: The Traditional Latin Mass and Divine Office as a navigable subway map
bundle.longDescription: St. Android's Missal presents the Traditional Latin Mass (1962 Missal) and the Divine Office of the Extraordinary Form as a subway-style map: bilingual exegetical reader, annotations, corpus concordance, vector similarity, cross-references, and a perpetual liturgical calendar computed by Butcher's Easter algorithm.
